plugins.name: StorageQuoter
plugins.tagline: Effortless instant quoting for self-storage websites.
plugins.heroImageAlt: StorageQuoter quote calculator preview — multi-step unit selection with pricing and lead capture
plugins.previewCaption: multi-step quote calculator with pricing, location and unit-type filters.

plugins.name: Storage Unit Booking
plugins.tagline: Carousel-based unit selection and reservation, end-to-end.
plugins.whoItsFor: Operators who want reservations to happen on their own domain.
plugins.heroImageAlt: Storage Unit Booking preview — Elementor carousel selector and reservation form
plugins.previewCaption: carousel-based unit selector with reservation form and admin dashboard.

plugins.name: StoraX
plugins.tagline: The native WordPress integration for Stora-platform operators.
plugins.whoItsFor: Self-storage operators already running on the Stora platform.
plugins.note: StoraX is a third-party integration built and maintained by Amax Marketing. Not officially endorsed by Stora.
plugins.heroImageAlt: StoraX preview — live unit availability and pricing surfaced from the Stora Public API
plugins.previewCaption: live unit availability and pricing surfaced from the Stora Public API.

plugins.name: Kinnovis Client Portal
plugins.tagline: Custom template selection & onboarding portal for Kinnovis.
plugins.whoItsFor: Built for Kinnovis. Reference build for similar bespoke work.
plugins.note: Built specifically for Kinnovis. Listed as part of the self-storage suite for completeness.
plugins.heroImageAlt: Kinnovis Client Portal preview — template library and client onboarding interface
plugins.previewCaption: template selection, onboarding journey and ticket-management workflow.

plugins.name: Client Approvals Hub
plugins.tagline: Replace email approval chains with secure, trackable client sign-off.
plugins.whoItsFor: Marketing, branding, web and digital agencies running monthly client deliverables.
plugins.heroImageAlt: Client Approvals Hub preview — agency approval workflow with pinned annotations and revision rounds
plugins.previewCaption: tokenised client approvals with pinned annotations and revision rounds.

plugins.name: Site Audit
plugins.tagline: Automated SEO & performance audit with lead capture, for agencies.
plugins.whoItsFor: Anyone who wants a Core Web Vitals + SEO snapshot of their WordPress site.
plugins.heroImageAlt: Site Audit preview — automated SEO and Core Web Vitals report with lead capture form
plugins.previewCaption: automated SEO and Core Web Vitals report with lead capture.
